headline: Accenture invests in DaVinci Commerce for AI powered shopping
summary: Accenture announced a strategic investment and global partnership with DaVinci Commerce to advance agentic AI-led shopping experiences. DaVinci Commerce launched its Agentic BrandStore platform that powers AI storefronts, securing financing from Accenture as part of the deal.
so_what: This investment shows Accenture's focus on AI-powered customer experience solutions, particularly in retail and commerce. Healthcare organizations looking to improve patient engagement and digital experiences may find similar AI solutions appealing.
original_title: Accenture Invests in DaVinci Commerce to Advance Agentic AI-Led Shopping - Accenture
